column3:
Oops! something's come up,
but I'll ask for more help later!
Take this for your help so far!

Hey rookie!
Got an urgent mission for you!

The Kaijin are growing
in power lately.

With such a large Kaijin,
threat, the Nyanko Rangers
can't possibly handle them all.
We'll take any help we can get!

And I thought, this is the
perfect test for an aspiring Ranger!
So how about it?
Up for the challenge?

Thanks a ton!
Glad to have you on the team!

First, you ought to take
the Ranger licensing exam, just
to make sure you got what it takes.

I'm sure you'll pass easily
and become a fine Ranger!

We'll have you safeguarding the
town's peace with us in no time!

I'll help you prepare for
the test, and we'll make
sure you pass with flying colors!

Also, please invite
your friends to play
The Battle Cats!

The more Rangers
we have, the safer
the world will be, y'know?

So it'd really help us out if
your friends signed up
to become Rangers too!

The Battle Cats rages on!
The endless campaign continues,
so recruit your buddies
to join the Cat's cause!

You know, just recruit
your friends directly!

So just lend us a paw, and
there'll of course be
tons of Cat Food rewards
as repayment for you!

Looking forward to
fighting evil alongside you
and your friends!

So, future Ranger, you've
got your first test
coming up tomorrow!

Don't forget to
invite your friends!
Tomorrow's a big day!

Sheesh! I can't hear a thing
in this helmet! What was that
you said, future Ranger?

Look, I've got a small
favor to ask of you.
Got a minute to hear me out?

Thanks for coming!
Always happy to see you!

You invited your friends to
try out The Battle Cats, yeah?

Thanks a ton!
Just keep spreading the word
and we'll have a proper squad
of new Rangers in no time!

But first things first...
we gotta get your paperwork
sorted for the aptitude screening
portion of the exam.

This first test will
determine if you're truly
qualified to be a Ranger.

Sheesh, this paperwork
is 222 pages long!
Who has time to fill all this out?
That's way too much!

Don't worry, though.
I used Cat CPU's AI
to fill out everything...
Except for that last question.

So your catchphrase is...
"Deep-Fried Donuts!"?
Well, good enough for now.

Look, just give us a serious
answer for this last question.
It's REAL important!

Who is your favorite
Nyanko Ranger?

Wow, that's a stumper!
So, you got an answer in mind?

The fierce 'n fiery
Red Nyanko Ranger
is your favorite, then?

Aww, thanks!
I'm so honored!

You didn't hesitate a second
before choosing me! Let's write
down "Red Ranger" in HUGE
letters so it's real clear.

Well, seems everything's in order!
I'll take it from here
and submit it on your behalf.

I'll be back tomorrow
with the results of
this first exam.
Look forward to it!

In the meantime, why not
invite a couple more friends
so we can fill out the squad?
Catch you later!

Aww! Pretty please?
Won't you think of
the peace of the city?!

Look, I'd consider it a
personal favor if you invited
a friend before tomorrow?

Pinky promise, yeah?!
We're counting on your support!

Is the never-say-die
spirit of the Red Ranger
your favorite?

Hypothetically,
is the Red Nyanko Ranger
your favorite?

I'll ask you again from the start...
Look me in the eye
and answer truthfully!

Thanks for comin' again today!
Been waiting for you!

So, let's get to it.
Did you invite your friends?

I knew I could count on you!
Now the Nyanko Rangers
will be even stronger!

We're always recruiting
more Rangers, y'know, so
please keep trying to recruit
more friends!

So, I've got your
aptitude test results
right here. You ready?
It says here that…

You passed!
Right on, future Ranger!

Your heartfelt answer must
have really resonated with
the Ranger committee!

I'll be sure to thank you
with a Cat CPU properly later on.

Now we're on to the real thing -
the final exam!
You can expect this test
to be SUPER difficult!

In my day, they made
me demonstrate 100 signature
poses in a row, no slip-ups!

100 poses in 1 minute
without being off by 1 inch!
Now that's a real challenge!

I trained fiercely all night,
every night, for a month
before I finally passed!

So this one should be
just as challenging, yeah?
Let's check what it is...
This time, your exam format is...

A lottery!
Relying on nothing but
luck to see you through.
In a way, that's the hardest test!

Don't worry, though!
You just leave the exam
prep to me, future Ranger!

See, I've gotten Super Rares
from my last 5 Capsule draws!
We got this in the bag!

See you tomorrow to
tell you the lottery results,
so drop in to see me!
We're all counting on you!

Sheesh!
You didn't forget our
promise, did you?

You SWORE to invite
your friends to fight
alongside us Rangers!

I believe in my heart that
you'll invite them tomorrow
so we can at last defeat
that nasty Kaijin army!
Don't let me down!

I've been waiting!
Are you prepared to hear
your final exam results?

This will make or break
your future as a Ranger!
No pressure or anything!

Before I announce the results...
I have a confession to
make... Don't get mad!

Truth is... I didn't
make it in time to
enter you into the lottery.

Just as I was about to
submit it to the Cat CPU,
an urgent call for
Ranger backup came in.

I was the only Ranger
available at the time,
so I had no choice but to rush
right over and help.

Didn't want to cause
you any trouble, so I
rushed the mission a bit,
but I still didn't make it...

And that's why I couldn't
enter you in the lottery.
I feel real bad about that...

Huh?
Looks like I just got an email
that wasn't there before.
Let me check...

You passed?!
Says here you've been
accepted as a new Ranger recruit!

In addition to assisting the
Rangers in many good deeds,
you scouted potential recruits
to increase our numbers.

Well, that's just great!!
I told ya, my motto's always
been "Good deeds reward
good Cats in turn"!

Your hard work spreading
the word to your friends
really contributed to the good
results we've been getting!

Thanks a million, Ranger!
At long last, you're
an official member of the
Nyanko Ranger team!

With our strength combined,
we'll be able to take
down tons of Kaijin
and save the city!

And while we're celebrating...
You've done us some real
favors, so here's something
extra, just from me!

Nya-Nyah!
777 Cat Food!
Don't spend it all in one place!
